nodes.label: Validates skill pattern matching and application.
Load skills from all plugins via the shared PluginLoader.          PluginLoader
Create and add a skill object from a normalized dict.
Enrich skill keywords and patterns from the SKILL.md document.          ``skill_
Infer file patterns from skill name.
Analyze a file to extract context for skill matching.
Calculate how well a skill matches the given context.
Determine if skill should apply to this context (ground truth).
Test skill application across all contexts.          Iterates over the test corp
Generate explanation for skill application decision.
Return status icon based on condition.
